1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get buildings in that municipality (filter by kommunenummer)

3.description: get 200-year storm-flo polygons (stormflo200ar_klimaarna) limited to municipality extent later with spatial_join)

4.description: get 200-year flood polygons (flomareal gjentaksintervall=200) limited to municipality extent later with spatial_join)

5.description: find buildings that intersect storm-flo polygons (intersects)

6.description: from buildings that intersect storm-flo, find those that also intersect 200-year flood polygons (intersects)

7.description: collapse to one row per bygningid (group by bygningid) to deduplicate

replan_trigger.error: Step 3 exhausted SQL repair budget (2 attempts).

1.description: get Kristiansand kommunenummer and municipality bbox

2.description: get buildings in Kristiansand by kommunenummer

3.description: get 200-year storm-surge polygons limited to municipality bbox

4.description: get 200-year flood polygons limited to municipality bbox

5.description: find buildings that intersect storm-surge polygons

6.description: find buildings that intersect flood polygons

7.description: keep only buildings that intersect both layers by joining on bygningid

8.description: one row per bygningid (collapse duplicates) by counting matches
